calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-11-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Rita Howell.
Ginger Sotelo, Esq. for Plaintiff: Aerofund Financial, Inc. with Witness: Stephen Troy, present, sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Inner Act, LLC; James S. Muldner aka J. Scott Muldner; North Valley Precision Products, LLC, as follows:
Damages $394,605.50
Prejudgment Interest $25,622.07
Attorney fees $7,356.00
Costs $640.95 for a total of $428,224.52.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2006 Continued To Feb-23-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2006 Continued To Dec-15-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MOTION To Set Aside Entry Of Default
Off Calendar Oct-17-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT GOLDEN WEST EQUIPMENT, INC.'S MOTION To Set Aside Entry Of Default.
APPEARANCE: Tom Roddy Normandin, Esq. of Prenovost, Normandin, Bergh & Dawe A Professional Corporation 714/547-2444 for deft & moving party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S ATTORNEY TO PAY $1,043 TO PLAINTIFF TO COVER FEES IN OBTAINING DEFAULT. Defendant has 10 day to answer(/file possible cross-complaint). Defendant to prepare proposed order. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
